doctrine: Optimize root causes of success, not failure. The eval suite is the skill being optimized.
stop_reason: E14+E15 candidates rejected — wrong target or no test input reveals gap
root_causes_instantiated: RC-1: Binary precision — enforced via anti-pattern table
RC-2: Adversarial expansion — Expansion Protocol section
RC-3: Test input diversity — anti-pattern: 5 identical types
RC-4: Eval → mutation — Implies mutation field (mandatory)
RC-5: Evals grow harder — expansion evals must fail current skill
RC-6: Names are claims — 4-word format mandated
RC-7: Anti-patterns > virtues — anti-pattern table present
RC-8: Worked examples — pass + fail in every eval format
RC-9: Behavior not text — anti-pattern table teaches distinction
RC-10: Principled stop — Next Round Candidates mandatory on stop
next_round_candidates: E14: Baseline discipline — wrong target (autoresearch's job)
E15: Conflicting eval handling — no test input triggers a conflict yet
